display.purpose: Screen titles and the rare hero. Sporting grotesque, tight tracking.

score.purpose: Every goal/score/point total. Tabular figures so columns align.

body.purpose: Dense UI and data at small sizes where legibility wins.

label.purpose: Metadata, chips, dates, the L/E/V outcome letters.

shadows.name: lifted
shadows.purpose: Bottom tab bar and sticky headers — minimal separation from scrolling content.

shadows.name: sheet
shadows.purpose: Bottom sheets rising over the backdrop. The only strong shadow.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions and sheet entrances. No bounce.

motion.name: dur-sheet
motion.purpose: Bottom sheet slide-up; crossfade fallback under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one strong action per context (Guardar predicción). Pitch green, white label.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(1 0 0); background: oklch(0.48 0.12 150); border: none; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 20px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.42 0.12 150); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.48 0.12 150); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: oklch(0.42 0.12 150); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-emphasis actions (Editar, Invitar). Transparent with green ink and hairline.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.38 0.10 150); background: oklch(1 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.91 0.006 152); border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 20px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.975 0.008 150); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.48 0.12 150); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Filter and group-selector pills. Unselected subtle; selected pitch green.
components.css: .ds-chip { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.46 0.012 152); background: oklch(0.975 0.008 150); border: none; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 6px 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-chip--selected { background: oklch(0.48 0.12 150); color: oklch(1 0 0); } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.48 0.12 150); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Match Card
components.description: Resting container. White, hairline border, no shadow, generous padding.
components.html:
Grupo A · Vie 26 jun · 17:00
🇲🇽 México vs Sudáfrica 🇿🇦
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(1 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.91 0.006 152); border-radius: 16px; padding: 16px; } .ds-card__meta { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.46 0.012 152); margin-bottom: 10px; } .ds-card__teams { font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.125rem; color: oklch(0.22 0.015 152); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-card__vs { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.46 0.012 152); }

components.name: Score Breakdown Row
components.description: Signature. A finished match: pick cells [home][L/E/V][away] each green/red with check/cross, plus Res and points. This example shows a partial hit (home goal right, away goal wrong, outcome right).
components.html: 🇲🇽 MX2✓V✓0✗ZA 🇿🇦Res 0–2+4
components.css: .ds-bd { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: oklch(1 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.91 0.006 152); border-radius: 16px; padding: 14px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-bd__team { font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: oklch(0.22 0.015 152); } .ds-bd__cell { font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; font-feature-settings: 'tnum'; min-width: 32px; text-align: center; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 8px; position: relative; } .ds-bd__cell sup { font-size: 0.6rem; margin-left: 1px; } .ds-bd__cell--ok { background: oklch(0.95 0.04 150); color: oklch(0.38 0.10 150); } .ds-bd__cell--miss { background: oklch(0.95 0.05 25); color: oklch(0.45 0.16 27); } .ds-bd__res { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: oklch(0.46 0.012 152); margin-left: auto; } .ds-bd__pts { font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.38 0.10 150); background: oklch(0.95 0.04 150); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 4px 10px; }

components.name: Pleno Badge
components.description: Signature. The crown — gold pill, only for an exact-score pleno (7 pts).
components.css: .ds-pleno { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.34 0.06 70); background: oklch(0.82 0.13 84); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 4px 10px; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.89 0.10 86); }

components.name: Bottom Tab Bar
components.description: Primary mobile navigation: Hoy · Partidos · Grupos. Active tab pitch green.
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: flex; background: oklch(1 0 0); border-top: 1px solid oklch(0.91 0.006 152); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0.22 0.015 152 / 0.06), 0 2px 8px oklch(0.22 0.015 152 / 0.08); border-radius: 16px 16px 0 0; padding: 6px; } .ds-tab { flex: 1; min-height: 44px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.46 0.012 152); background: none; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; } .ds-tab--active { color: oklch(0.48 0.12 150); background: oklch(0.975 0.008 150); }

narrative.overview: better-prode lives where the pitch meets the scorekeeper's ledger. The energy is football — green, competitive, the small electric thrill of nailing a score — but the surface is the calm precision of a fintech you trust with your money. Pitch green carries the brand; the surface stays pure white; gold is reserved for the pleno alone. Information is dense but the layout breathes: fintech spacing, clear hierarchy, never the cramped wall of a legacy prode. It rejects the old amontonado prode and the generic gray SaaS dashboard.
keyCharacteristics: Pure white surface; mood carried by pitch green + gold, never a tinted background.
One confident green primary; gold spent only on plenos.
Dense but breathing — fintech rhythm over scoreboard cram.
Glanceable truth: results, picks and points read in one look (color + position + value).
Mobile-first, thumb-honest; flat by default, depth only on lifted surfaces.

rules.name: The Gold-For-Glory Rule
rules.body: Gold appears only on a pleno and the podium. Its scarcity is what makes a pleno feel earned.

rules.name: The White-Field Rule
rules.body: The body background is literal oklch(1 0 0). Warmth/identity lives in green + gold + type, never in a tinted surface.

rules.name: The Tabular Score Rule
rules.body: Any number representing a score, goal count, or point total uses tabular figures so columns align digit-for-digit.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Resting cards and rows have no shadow — separation is a hairline or a subtle band. Shadow is earned by lifting (sheet, sticky, tab bar).

dos: Do keep the body background pure white; carry warmth in pitch green, gold, and type.
Do reserve Glory Gold for plenos and the podium only.
Do make finished results glanceable — picks color-coded green/red with ✓/✗ and position, no tap-to-expand.
Do use tabular figures for every score, goal, and point total.
Do give cards and rows room to breathe (16px padding, hairline separation).
Do keep touch targets ≥44px with a visible pitch-green focus ring.
Do put unbounded detail (team history, a member's predictions) in a bottom sheet with vertical scroll.
donts: Don't rebuild the amontonado legacy prode: no cramped illegible tables, no everything-fighting-for-space.
Don't ship the generic gray SaaS dashboard: no default-shadcn slate, no soulless neutral.
Don't use light elegant gray for body/muted text — muted is oklch(0.46 0.012 152) or darker.
Don't use a colored border-left/right greater than 1px as a side-stripe accent; encode outcome with cell tint + ✓/✗ + the points badge.
Don't put scores or unbounded lists in a horizontally-scrolling strip inside a card.
Don't drop shadows on resting cards; flat at rest, lift only sheets/sticky/tab bar.
Don't tint the surface warm (no cream/sand/parchment) or add hidden chroma to white.
Don't spend gold on anything that isn't a pleno or the podium.
